name: Spec-Driven Development
description: Use when starting a new project, creating a workspace, planning a feature, or executing a build — triggers on /spec, 'build this', 'plan a project', 'new workspace', 'add a feature', 'start blitz', or architecture questions. The primary skill for going from idea to working code.

default_depth.description: Default spec depth for new workspaces

auto_create_github.description: Automatically create GitHub repo when creating workspace

blitz_auto_approve.description: Auto-approve all changes during blitz phase (use with caution)
